comment: Spring Data JPA repositories — Spring Boot 3.x AOT generates concrete implementations at build time, so these JDK interface proxies are NOT needed at runtime. Listed here as documentation only; remove this file if it causes conflicts with AOT-generated classes.
Spring Security filter chain — @EnableWebSecurity uses CGLIB (not JDK proxies) for SecurityFilterChain beans. AOT processes these at build time. No JDK proxy registration required.
Spring AOP — no @EnableAspectJAutoProxy is present in this codebase. If AOP is added later, register interface proxies here.
